issue.title: Design: dark gradient hero section — navy/purple bg, SVG bolt with glow animation
issue.description: Hero section needs a dark background (navy/purple gradient) with white text. Replace the ⚡️ emoji with the actual SVG lightning bolt from the favicon. Add a subtle glow animation on the bolt. Spec the exact gradient colors, text hierarchy, and animation timing.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
